title: How Ricursive Intelligence raised $335M at a $4B valuation in 4 months
description: The reason why this nascent startup had VCs lining up is the founders.They are so famed in the AI world, everyone tried to hire them.

title: Flapping Airplanes on the future of AI: ‘We want to try really radically different things’
description: "We're exploring a different set of tradeoffs."

title: After all the hype, some AI experts don’t think OpenClaw is all that exciting
description: "From an AI research perspective, this is nothing novel," one expert told TechCrunch.

title: Fractal Analytics’ muted IPO debut signals persistent AI fears in India
description: As India's first AI company to IPO, Fractal Analytics didn't have a stellar first day on the public markets, as enthusiasm for the technology collided with jittery investors in the wake of a sell-off in Indian software stocks.

title: All the important news from the ongoing India AI Impact Summit
description: India is hosting a four-day AI Summit this week that will be attended by executives from major AI labs and Big Tech, including OpenAI, Anthropic, Nvidia, Microsoft, Google, and Cloudflare, as well as heads of state.

title: African defensetech Terra Industries, founded by two Gen Zers, raises additional $22M in a month
description: Terra Industries, the African defense company, announced Monday that it had secured an additional $22 million in funding to further expand the business.

title: As AI data centers hit power limits, Peak XV backs Indian startup C2i to fix the bottleneck
description: C2i has raised $15 million as it tests a grid-to-GPU approach to reducing power losses in AI data centers.

title: Blackstone backs Neysa in up to $1.2B financing as India pushes to build domestic AI infrastructure
description: Neysa is targeting deployments of more than 20,000 GPUs over time as demand for local AI compute accelerates.

title: OpenClaw creator Peter Steinberger joins OpenAI
description: OpenAI said OpenClaw will live on as an open source project.

title: India has 100M weekly active ChatGPT users, Sam Altman says
description: OpenAI CEO Sam Altman says India has the largest number of student users of ChatGPT worldwide.

title: The enterprise AI land grab is on. Glean is building the layer beneath the interface.
description: In this week's episode of the Equity podcast, Glean CEO Arvind Jain explains the company's shift from enterprise search tool to middleware layer for enterprise AI.

title: Hollywood isn’t happy about the new Seedance 2.0 video generator
description: Hollywood organizations are pushing back against a new AI video model called Seedance 2.0, which they say has quickly become a tool for “blatant” copyright infringement.

title: The great computer science exodus (and where students are going instead)
description: Students are losing some interest in computer science broadly but gaining interest in AI-specific majors and courses.

title: Apple starts testing end-to-end encrypted RCS messages on iPhone
Apple’s Podcasts app will let you ‘seamlessly’ switch between audio and video shows
After spooking Hollywood, ByteDance will tweak safeguards on new AI model
OpenClaw founder Peter Steinberger is joining OpenAI
